description_long: This is a classic football with a spherical shape, featuring a traditional black and white pattern. The surface is composed of alternating black pentagonal and white hexagonal panels, creating a visually striking geometric design. The seams between the panels are slightly raised, indicating a stitched or bonded construction. The ball's exterior appears to be made of synthetic leather or polyurethane, giving it a smooth and slightly glossy finish. There are no visible logos, text, or branding elements on the surface. The object is clean and shows no signs of wear, scuffing, or deformation, suggesting it is new or unused.
description: A classic black and white football with a geometric panel pattern and a smooth, clean surface. The ball is spherical and shows no visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: This view shows a mix of black pentagonal and white hexagonal panels, with clear seams and a smooth surface.
description_view_1: This view centers on a black pentagonal panel surrounded by white hexagons, highlighting the symmetry of the pattern.
description_view_2: This angle displays more of the alternating black and white panels, emphasizing the ball's spherical geometry.
description_view_3: This view focuses on a black pentagonal panel with surrounding white hexagons, similar to view 1 but from a slightly different angle.
